title: Green Blade BB-CW104 5 x 0.9m Galvanized Wire Netting with 25mm Mesh
features: This galvanised hexagonal wire netting is strong, durable, long lasting & suitable for a wide range of uses.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: Product Description Green Blade galvanised hexagonal wire netting is strong, durable, long lasting and suitable for a wide ranges of uses. Galvanised finish will ensure extra resistance to rusting. Ideal for fencing, plant protection and support, dog and child proofing gardens, chicken runs, animal enclosures. Supplied in shrink wrapped with colour insert. Gauge: 20g. Net measures 5m length by 0.9m height by 25mm diameter hexagonal hole. Green Blade offers a comprehensive range of garden tools and general garden maintenance products. Highly visible branded packaging. 12 month no quibble guarantee. If you’re a novice gardener or just keen to upgrade your outdated tools, Greenblade can help. Bringing together a huge choice of equipment, so that you will find all you need, from a hardwearing pair of Gloves to a Ratchet Tree Pruner or even a Garden Cart. Greenblade provide top quality garden tools that will take the strain out of even the hardest of tasks. Box Contains 1 x Piece
